profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Wahana Interfood Nusantara Tbk manufactures and sells cocoa and chocolate products in Indonesia and Southeast Asia. The company provides cocoa powder, couverture chocolates, chocolate powder drinks, compound chocolates, real chocolate, chocolate filling and spread, and other food and beverages. It offers its products under the SCHOKO brand name. PT Wahana Interfood Nusantara Tbk was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Bandung, Indonesia. PT Wahana Interfood Nusantara Tbk operates as a subsidiary of Mahogany Global Investment Pte. Ltd.
